entry.title: Fire Fem Stiles Teen Wolf AU
entry.summary:
Author: Fantastic_writer06

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,790Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 672

Summary: What if, after the warehouse someone does notice that Nova Stilisnki was hurt? What if Nova walked away from Scott when he couldn't pick more then 10 years of friendship over a couple of months relationship? What if some people went and checked up on Nova after the events? What happens when this change, alters everything? What happens when Nova discovers something about her that she never knew was there? What happens when two wolves find out their mates to Nova? Read to find outDon't own Teen wolf. Only Nova and part of her backstory

entry.title: It's a Wednesday
entry.summary:
Author: idratherwrite

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,600Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: The thing about Stiles is that he doesn’t deal with depression by slowing down but by progressively speeding up. It’s been a learning curve for Derek. Or, something's making Stiles sad, and Derek knows just what to do about it.

entry.title: Hale Blood, Stilinski Chaos, Dutton Country
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,402Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 19

Summary: Stilinski & Hale family hit the Dutton Ranch and nothing stays calm for long. Isabelle draws attention she didn’t ask for, Peter gets possessive in record time, Derek decides bull riding is a personality now, and Stiles is 50% concern, 50% distracted appreciation. Beth Dutton stirs chaos like it’s cardio, Rip judges everyone equally, and John Dutton tries to keep the peace while slowly realizing that’s not happening. Cowboys, wolves, tension, and absolutely no emotional safety in sight.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,801Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 915

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: Knotting Moon
entry.summary:
Author: EverythingRara

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,298Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: The moon was high and sharp in the sky, nearing its peak, casting long luminous streams through the large wall length windows.Rays of light shining across Stiles' shuddering form where he lay sprawled naked and face down on the living room floor of Derek's loft."No more," Stiles croaked, voice hoarse, throat nearly raw.His eyes were closed, but he could hear the sharp click click click of Derek's paw pads as he drew closer, feel the moist heat of his breath against the skin of Stiles' reddened ass.A cool nose shoved at him, Derek's chest rumbling in a low growl. Stiles immediately understood the silent demand for what it was: Lift your ass up."I can't," he shook his head against the floor, his asshole was done for—alliterated beyond repair. "Derek, please." come from the previous rounds was still leaking out of him, slicking his thighs and dripping onto the floor.Derek's growl deepened into a snarl, and sharp teeth nipped at his skin, a warning. A demand. Obey.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski: Emotional Support Human & Werewolf Chew Toy
entry.summary:
Author: Jinxy143

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,869Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Stiles has options. You’re just along for the ride—so hop into Roscoe and see where this goes.Bring your Stiles body pillow. You might need it. Scott gets bitten.Everything changes. Suddenly, the world is louder, sharper, and a whole lot more dangerous—and the only thing keeping Scott from losing control is his loud-mouthed, chaos-magnet best friend, Stiles. Which would be fine.Except it’s not just Scott. Derek’s watching.Peter’s interested.And for some reason, everyone is getting a little too intense about Stiles Stilinski. Now Stiles is stuck in the middle of werewolves, bad decisions, and a rapidly escalating situation he definitely did not sign up for — while trying very hard not to think about what it means to be the thing grounding them all. Because this?This is not normal. And it’s only going to get worse.

entry.title: Tangled, Ravelled, and Undogged
entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,515Chapters: 7/9Kudos: 51

Summary: After making several mistakes in a row, Stiles finds himself stuck in a haunted manor in the middle of a cursed wood, and faced with a terrifying, monstrous Beast demanding custody of some unlucky (and possibly beloved) scapegoat in exchange for Stiles' freedom. (But the Beast never said that Stiles couldn't visit.)

entry.title: How To Colossally Fuck Shit Up
entry.summary:
Author: Cashewchococake

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,092Chapters: 34/?Kudos: 327

Summary: A story about Derek and Stiles building their family and trying to find their way to each other.orStiles was looking at him expectedly.Derek took a deep breath and prepared himself for the upcoming words. “But I wasn’t the only one he smelled like, Stiles.”He looked pleadingly at Stiles, who'd gone deathly pale, and was now shaking his head.“Stiles-, Eli is your son.” Derek forced out.Stiles let out a small breathless sound of “Oh!”He shot up from the couch and took his head between his hands, pulling his hair.When that didn’t help to quiet the raging flood of questions in his head, he started pacing.“What? -I mean…how? How is that even possible?""Why the hell would you keep that from me?” He was spluttering.Stiles couldn’t believe what he was hearing.  Why would Derek do that?

entry.title: if you promise not to fade away
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,910Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: “Derek, Der, it’s okay, I’m okay!” he says hurriedly, shutting off the water and racing over to Derek. In a moment, the wolf collapses to his knees in the kitchen, weight heavy as he falls to the floor. Stiles sinks with him, wrapping his arms around him; his shoulders, his face, his head, anywhere he can reach and touch and soothe. Derek’s breathing is coming far too quickly, and there’s a faraway look in his eyes that’s never good. Something seems to switch in his brain and he suddenly flinches, his own hands coming up to cover his mouth and nose as his eyes squeeze shut.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Copain of the black wolf.
entry.summary:
Author: EverythingRara

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 229,801Chapters: 27/40Kudos: 1,204

Summary: A Sterek rewrite of the show, that stays mostly canon compliant in the beginning, shown exclusively through the eyes of Stiles Stilinski, unknown soul mate of Derek Hale.Starts slow emotionally, my first attempt at a story of this degree please be gentle.Stiles grunted softly as he heaved himself onto the roof, his sneakers scuffing against the shingles. Scott—his best friend since forever—wasn’t answering his phone, and Stiles couldn’t wait. There was no way Scott was going to believe what Stiles had just overheard.Keeping low, Stiles crept along the roof toward Scott’s window, his heart racing as the cool night air pressed against his skin. He tried the window, but it wouldn’t budge—it was locked.“Of course it’s locked,” he muttered under his breath, rolling his eyes.Knocking softly on the glass, he leaned in closer, squinting to peer inside. The curtains were drawn, giving him only a hazy, distorted view of the room beyond. “Scott,” he hissed, rapping on the window again. No answer.Suddenly, the curtains shifted, and the window flung open. Scott and Stiles screamed, startling each other.

entry.title: Of A Butterfly's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: Mikaelsonbich25

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 138,080Chapters: 88/?Kudos: 292

Summary: Klaus had expected to be done with life after sacrificing himself. He was sure that he could finally rest and be done with it. But, much to his dismay, an otherworldly being had other plans, due to finding Klaus as a source of entertainment.In snatching away his desired death, Klaus Mikaelson was reincarnated into another world as a young magic caster named Stiles Stilinski. With no choice but to live, Klaus decides to use this opportunity to take over Beacon Hills and make it his kingdom.And maybe one day, he'll be strong enough to find a way back home to his world.

entry.title: Twice And For All - Rewritten
entry.summary:
Author: novasillies

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 174,686Chapters: 27/66Kudos: 104

Summary: “W’s… What…” Stiles’ voice slurred, “Dad– … forgot-me.” His head slammed back down into the carpet. Noah stared down at him like he’d failed as a parent, “Get the hell up, kid. You’ve got school. Against your most hopeful belief, summer didn’t last forever.” Stiles felt sick. He couldn’t do this shit. “You’re a Sophomore, now, kid,” the Sheriff said, a little louder, nudging Stiles with his foot, “Don’t make me regret teaching you to drive. I’m not helping you get to school anymore. It’s time to grow up.” His voice was fading, his footsteps creaking away, and Stiles just huffed as he muttered into the dust floating past him, little sunbeams shooting past his head, “I did the growing up already.” “And stop wasting my printer ink!” Noah called out as he left, “That crap isn’t cheap!” - Stiles' spark fucks with the magic of the Ghost Riders and catapults him back to the day Scott got bit. Stranded in the past, the only way to ease his endless guilt is to try his damn best to fix it all. With... varying degrees of success. A rewrite of Twice And For All. it’ll end the same, but we might get there a little differently. #growth (Can and should be read as a standalone/part 1)

entry.title: Part Five: Stark Revelations
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,274Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: Flash Thompson gets kidnapped by Norman Osborn, Peter’s secret identity explodes into the open, and Tony’s own deadly secret is exposed right back. In one disastrous night of rescues, revelations, and near-losses, the Stark family is forced to stop hiding from each other long enough to survive. By the time Iron Man and Spider-Man take the fight to Osborn, nothing between them will ever be the same.

entry.title: When Werewolves Do Jane Austen Shit
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,711Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 58

Summary: After the Hale Fire, Laura and Derek, along with Cora, steal comatose Peter out of the hospital. Laura gives up the alpha spark to bring Peter back. But a pack, even the mighty Hales, can only survive so long without an alpha. Derek had always known that he was to be trained for a marriage alliance with another pack, and he will do whatever it takes to keep his family safe. Stiles knows the McCall pack is on borrowed time. They've kept Beacon Hills safe, but they have no money, no history, no respect from the good side of the supernatural world. He knows they need to go to the Summit meeting...party...thing, and make connections or they are screwed. Two groups in desperate need, stuck in a conference hotel in Vegas. Whatever will happen?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Peter Hale/Sheriff Stilinski

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,583Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: My Name is Ours at Night
entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,150Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 31

Summary: (End season 2) After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his body and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry. Derek knows there's a threat in town. He just didn't expect it to look like Stiles.
